hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then exit 0; fi; exec bun "$root/dist/cli.js" hook
hooks.commandWindows: if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } else { exit 0 }

hooks.commandWindows: if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } else { exit 0 }

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then exit 0; fi; exec bun "$root/dist/cli.js" hook
hooks.commandWindows: if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { & bun "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\dist\cli.js" hook } else { exit 0 }
